description: Avg standing and driving noise dB for passenger cars by registration decade. Use when user asks if cars got quieter or about era noise. EVs lack combustion-noise fields.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1960 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2026 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStandStoej IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStandStoej > 50 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStandStoej < 120 | EVAL decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1970, "1960s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "1970s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*), avg_standing_noise_db = AVG(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStandStoej), avg_driving_noise_db = AVG(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorKoerselStoej) BY decade | SORT decade ASC | LIMIT 10
